---
title: "reference_group_norm"
generated: true
description: "Group normalisation per sample and group (reference oracle)."
---

[â€ą back to `nitrix.nn.norm`](../nitrix-nn-norm.qmd)

*Re-exported here; defined in `nitrix.nn.norm._reference`.*

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:reference_group_norm -->
```python
reference_group_norm(x: Float[Array, 'n c *spatial'], num_groups: int, weight: Optional[Float[Array, 'c']] = None, bias: Optional[Float[Array, 'c']] = None, *, eps: float = 1e-05, out_scale: float = 1.0) -> Float[Array, 'n c *spatial']
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:reference_group_norm -->
Group normalisation per sample and group (reference oracle).

Split the `C` channels of a channels-first input into `num_groups`
contiguous groups, then normalise over each group's channels together with
all spatial axes, independently per sample and group, using the mean and
biased variance. The optional per-channel affine transform is applied
channel-wise, and the result is scaled by `out_scale`.

The reductions (mean and variance) and the affine transform run in at least
single precision: a `float16` / `bfloat16` input is upcast to
`float32` and the result cast back to the input dtype, while `float32`
and `float64` inputs are left unchanged.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen params:reference_group_norm -->
**Parameters**

| parameter | type | shape | default | description |
|------------|--------|--------|----------|--------------------------------------------------------------|
| `x` | `Float` | `n` Ă— `c` Ă— `*spatial` | â€” | Channels-first input tensor: leading sample axis `n`, channel axis `c`, then zero or more spatial axes. |
| `num_groups` | `int` | â€” | â€” | Number of groups into which the `c` channels are partitioned. `c` must be divisible by `num_groups`. |
| `weight` | `Optional[Float[Array, 'c']]` | â€” | `None` | Per-channel affine scale. If `None`, no multiplicative scaling is applied. |
| `bias` | `Optional[Float[Array, 'c']]` | â€” | `None` | Per-channel affine shift. If `None`, no additive shift is applied. |
| `eps` | `float` | â€” | `1e-05` | Small constant added to the variance before taking the reciprocal square root, for numerical stability. |
| `out_scale` | `float` | â€” | `1.0` | Constant post-normalisation scale applied to the affine output, implementing the depth-scaling hook $\mathrm{out} = \mathrm{out\_scale}\cdot(\hat{x}\cdot w + b)$. |

**Returns** `Float` â€” shape `n` Ă— `c` Ă— `*spatial`. The normalised, affine-transformed and scaled tensor, with the same shape and dtype as `x`.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->


<!-- nitrix:gen dims:reference_group_norm -->
**Tensor dimensions**

| dim | meaning |
|---|---|
| `n` | query points, each an `ndim`-vector coordinate (variadic) |
| `c` | feature channels (channels-last) |
| `*spatial` | the spatial axes of a grid (variadic) |
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
